strengths: Current agentic AI/MCP production work at re:cinq directly demonstrates mastery of the core technical architecture required
Proven scale engineering at Dunnhumby (millions of requests/second, real-time data, low-latency design) demonstrates required backend/distributed systems depth
Fintech background (RIDE Capital) and scale operations (Optilyz) demonstrate capability in complex, high-stakes business environments
concerns: No executive or CTO-level leadership experience; entire career is senior IC and staff engineer roles, not VP or C-suite
No track record scaling engineering teams (10→30+) or building senior technical leadership layers—a core CTO requirement
Agentic AI production experience recent (April 2025); depth in production failure modes, cost modeling, and large-scale architectural decisions remains unproven
response.justification: Bogdan combines current hands-on expertise in agentic AI infrastructure (MCP, agent frameworks) with proven ability to architect production systems at scale (Dunnhumby: millions of requests/second, real-time processing, low-latency design). His fintech background (RIDE Capital) and track record teaching/elevating others (workshops, talks) demonstrate both domain knowledge and leadership instinct. The primary gap—no executive CTO experience or demonstrated team scaling (10→30+)—is substantial for a C-suite role, making him an unconventional candidate. However, his rare combination of technical depth in the exact domain (agentic AI), production-scale infrastructure mastery, and fintech familiarity positions him as a strong technical leader capable of growing into executive scope in a domain where architectural decisions demand hands-on expertise.
